4pqW9AF8nU.fact: Sentinel errors for expected failures — define var ErrX = errors.New("...") at package level for conditions callers need to check. Use errors.Is() to match.

5nfi7kUdb2.fact: Stutter is OK for the primary type (config.Config, project.Project — matches Go stdlib like http.Client). Avoid stutter on secondary types: config.PathResolver not config.ConfigPathResolver.

lcY0WNmcZ8.fact: Package names: single lowercase word, no underscores or mixedCase. Function names should be descriptive — the package qualifier carries domain context (e.g. project.CollectIDsFromFolder not project.ProjectCollectIDs).

sYNFGi5OHT.fact: internal/ is for project-private packages — all non-command logic goes here. The Go compiler prevents imports from outside the parent tree.

vBd7xRH3Tq.fact: One concern per package — each internal/ package owns one domain (config, platform, project, etc.). Don't create grab-bag util or helpers packages.

wcIXBkFIUJ.fact: Avoid init() in internal/ packages — init() with side effects (I/O, global state mutation) creates hidden coupling and test pain. Stateless init is acceptable. Pass dependencies explicitly.
